record.field: Develop an enterprise AI chatbot platform with NLP capabilities for BlueBolt customers.
Design the natural language processing architecture for the chatbot.
Complete redesign of the mobile application with new UX/UI guidelines.
User interviews, persona mapping, wireframe set
Figma components, design tokens, dark mode
Completed 20 user interviews and created full wireframe set.
Build a real-time data analytics dashboard for business intelligence.
PostgreSQL schema, dbt transformations, Airflow DAGs
REST API for chart data, aggregation endpoints
React + Chart.js, real-time updates via WebSocket
Waiting for data team to confirm source systems.
React chat widget with message history
End-to-end test suite for chatbot flows
Build a full-featured e-commerce platform with product catalog, cart, checkout, and order management.
Category tree, filters, full-text search with Elasticsearch
Cart management, promo codes, multi-step checkout
Refined architecture based on team feedback
Added message history and scroll behavior
Created user personas and journey maps
Added feed, banner carousel, and notifications icon
All technical specs designed and signed off by client
Chat UI + NLP engine working end-to-end
Deploy to production, go-live with Acme Corp
All user interviews and wireframes delivered
All screens implemented and in internal testing
Requirements review and sign-off session with Acme Corp
Live demo session with Acme Corp stakeholders — awaiting sign-off
UAT planning (duplicate entry — already logged on 2026-02-28)
Migrate legacy CRM to new platform. Data mapping, ETL, re-training users. Budget is tight — watch costs closely.
Map 140 legacy fields to new schema, handle nulls
Row count checks, spot audits, rollback plan
Weekly status calls, risk log, stakeholder updates
Customer signed off on field mapping document
ETL scripts running cleanly on staging clone
Weekend cut-over window, legacy system decommission
140 fields mapped, 12 deprecated fields flagged for archival
2 tables showing row-count mismatch — investigating timezone delta
Extracted legacy schema, built mapping spreadsheet
Edge-case handling: nulls, duplicates, encoding errors
Unit tests for all 14 transform functions
Code review fixes and staging deploy
First dry-run: 138/140 tables passed, 2 mismatches found
Investigating timezone mismatch in appointments table
Initial audit pass (auto-generated — rejected, see 2026-03-05 entry)
Weekly status call + risk register update
Cut-over plan document + FinTech sign-off meeting
Full ISO 27001 gap assessment, penetration testing, and remediation roadmap for Globex Corporation.
External pen test completed, findings documented
12-month remediation plan approved by Globex CISO
3 critical, 7 high, 14 medium findings. All critical patched during engagement.
Executive report delivered. Roadmap accepted by Globex CISO on 2026-02-27.
Gap register finalization and risk scoring
External recon, port scan, service enumeration
Web app testing: SQLi, XSS, IDOR, auth bypass
Internal network pen test + privilege escalation
Drafted executive summary and technical findings report
Decommission the old customer portal and redirect traffic. Cancelled — customer decided to keep legacy system running for another year.
301 redirect rules and DNS cutover plan — cancelled with project
Documented 47 pages, 12 active user accounts, 3 integrations
User account audit (incorrect time entry — resubmit)
